title: The Curse of a Bloodline
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Usopp, Unknown person #10, Rocks D. Xebec, Giants, Unknown person #11, King Harald as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf, New World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I ain't lettin' ya on my ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times do I gotta tell ya, Pipsqueak?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ya think I want a brat on my crew?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is this? The guy I want ain't given' me the time of day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his shot-nosed brat won't leave me alone!

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Hey, rocks, I think you're nika!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: NikA?

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: The Warrior of Liberation Who Will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...destroy the world while laughing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: destroy it? I'm aimin' to be the King of the World!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: besides, if anyone's got that sort of power, it's herald.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Listen up, LOK!! somewhere out there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Galera are slumberin' they're an outrageous band of Ravagers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the only one who can put them back into play...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: ...Is your pops!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna continue to rally the Rogers of the World!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So just imagine if Harald and I teamed up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who could possibly stop us then?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wow!! That's awesome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So why aren't you and pops allies already?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Because of love...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'm gonna come back again and again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if it takes 100 or 200 meetings...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: RUSTLE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a vicious assault!! King Harald of Elbaf is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: On a certain island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Have any civilians been harmed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your Highness, He's already out cold!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He attacked another giant... some thug...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's quite a brutal scene...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You still don't get it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I-I understand! Really, I'm sorry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'LL NEVER STEAL... FROM HUMANS AGAIN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't get it... None of you do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huge trash heaps like you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are responsible for the terrors in our race's history!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And that's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We can't be trusted!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We only desire to peacefully engage with the world now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But they can't trust that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't want to jeopardise Elbaf's chances of joining the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: For not helping him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That was my only reason...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it doesn't feel like luck's on my side anymore, Harald.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Lend me a hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I forsook my closest friend as he begged me for aid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I left him to die!!

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 54 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
